scripts.verify: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.deploy:preview: echo 'Preview deploy is owned by private AVALSYS runbooks. Run the private preflight with intent deploy before adding a real command.' && exit 1
scripts.testflight: echo 'Avi Words V0 is web-only. TestFlight/native release is owned by private runbooks and is intentionally unavailable.' && exit 1
